jobs.title: Senior Legal Specialist
jobs.description: BASIC PURPOSE OF THE JOB As Senior Legal Specialist, he/she will be responsible for providing legal advice and support on commercial and privacy related matters. MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES Working under the supervision of the Group Legal Affairs & IP Director for the Zegna Segment, he/she will provide legal guidance and advice to management and other departments on a wide range of legal and privacy matters affecting the business, in particular: * Draft, review, and negotiate contracts, agreements and other legal documents, such as supply and purchase agreements, services and consultancy agreement, lease agreements, franchise, agency and wholesale contracts * Manage the commercial contract lifecycle (negotiation, conclusion, follow-up of execution, renewal, termination) in compliance with applicable laws and internal policies, and maintain the contract lifecycle database up-to-date * Draft, review or update policies, agreements, documents and projects related to collection, use and disclosure of personal information, in accordance with changes in privacy laws and regulations and/or changes in business; manage a periodical assessment of the privacy governance * Provide legal advice on privacy matters to management and various departments * Working closely with the Group Compliance & Risk Manager, ensure compliance with relevant privacy legislation across the organization of the Zegna Segment and communicate privacy guidance to various stakeholders and departments * Support the Group Legal Affairs & IP Director in managing litigation related to his/her scope of responsibility * Seek appropriate guidance and support from external counsel or expert when necessary * Conduct legal research and stay updated on relevant laws and regulations in his/her scope of responsibility * Assess and manage legal risks associated with business operations and transactions in his/her scope of responsibility BACKGROUND AND PRINCIPAL SKILLS REQUIRED Solid knowledge of contracts in both Italian and English language and of privacy laws and international requirements Excellent business sense and problem-solving skills Proficiency in legal research and drafting in Italian and English Ability to work autonomously and as part of a team Strong organizational and time management skills Agility and openness to digital tools Strong attention to detail Ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously and capacity to work under pressure and/or with tight deadlines Proactive approach to identifying and addressing legal issues Ability to explain complex legal concepts to non-legal stakeholders Knowledge of the fashion or luxury sector is preferable Familiarity with cross-border operations for companies with global operations and/or listed companies will be considered a plus At least 5 years of legal experience, preferably including both in-house experience and experience in a law firm Master's Degree in Law Outstanding written and verbal communication abilities both in Italian and English

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione SCOPO BASE DEL LAVORO In qualità di Senior Legal Specialist, sarà responsabile di fornire consulenza legale e supporto su questioni commerciali e relative alla privacy. PRINCIPALI RESPONSABILITÀ Sotto la supervisione del Direttore degli Affari Legali e della Proprietà Intellectuale del Gruppo per il Segmento Zegna, fornirà consulenza legale alla direzione e ad altri dipartimenti su una vasta gamma di questioni legali e di privacy che riguardano l'azienda, in particolare: - Redigere, esaminare e negoziare contratti, accordi e altri documenti legali, come contratti di fornitura e acquisto, Contratti di servizi e consulenza, contratti di locazione, contratti di franchisaggio, agenzia e all'ingrosso - Gestire il ciclo di vita dei contratti commerciali (negoziazione, conclusione, follow-up dell'esecuzione, rinnovo, terminazione) in conformità con le leggi e le politiche interne applicabili, e mantenere aggiornato il database del ciclo di vita contrattuale - Redigere, revisionare o aggiornare politiche, accordi, documenti e progetti relativi alla raccolta, all'uso e alla divulgazione di informazioni personali, in conformità con i cambiamenti nelle leggi e regolamenti sulla privacy e/o nei cambiamenti nel settore commerciale; gestire una valutazione periodica della governance della privacy - Fornire consulenza legale su questioni di privacy alla direzione e ai vari dipartimenti - Lavorare a stretto contatto con il Responsabile Compliance & Risk del Gruppo, garantire il rispetto della legislazione sulla privacy pertinente in tutta l'organizzazione del Segmento Zegna e comunicare linee guida sulla privacy a vari stakeholder e dipartimenti - Supportare il Direttore Affari Legali e IP del Gruppo nella gestione delle controversie relative al suo ambito di responsabilità - Richiedere il ricorso appropriato Guida e supporto da parte di consulenti esterni o esperti quando necessario - Condurre ricerche legali e mantenersi aggiornati sulle leggi e regolamenti pertinenti nel proprio ambito di responsabilità - Valutare e gestire i rischi legali associati alle operazioni e alle transazioni aziendali nel proprio ambito di responsabilità COMPETENZE DI BACKGROUND E PRINCIPALI COMPETENZE RICHIESTE - Solida conoscenza dei contratti sia in italiano che in inglese e delle leggi sulla privacy e dei requisiti internazionali - Eccellente senso degli affari e Competenze di problem solving - Competenza nella ricerca e nella stesura giuridica in italiano e inglese - Capacità di lavorare in modo autonomo e come parte di un team - Solide capacità organizzative e di gestione del tempo - Agilità e apertura agli strumenti digitali - Forte attenzione ai dettagli - Capacità di gestire più progetti contemporaneamente e capacità di lavorare sotto pressione e/o con scadenze strette - Approccio proattivo nell'identificare e affrontare questioni legali - Capacità di spiegare concetti giuridici complessi a Stakeholder non legali - È preferibile conoscenza del settore della moda o del lusso - La familiarità con le operazioni transfrontaliere di società con operazioni globali e/o quotate sarà considerata un vantaggio - Almeno 5 anni di esperienza legale, preferibilmente inclusa sia esperienza interna che in uno studio legale - Master in Giurisprudenza - Eccezionali capacità di comunicazione scritta e orale sia in italiano che in inglese
descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione BASIC PURPOSE OF THE JOB As Senior Legal Specialist, he/she will be responsible for providing legal advice and support on commercial and privacy related matters. MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES Working under the supervision of the Group Legal Affairs & IP Director for the Zegna Segment, he/she will provide legal guidance and advice to management and other departments on a wide range of legal and privacy matters affecting the business, in particular: - Draft, review, and negotiate contracts, agreements and other legal documents, such as supply and purchase agreements, services and consultancy agreement, lease agreements, franchise, agency and wholesale contracts - Manage the commercial contract lifecycle (negotiation, conclusion, follow-up of execution, renewal, termination) in compliance with applicable laws and internal policies, and maintain the contract lifecycle database up-to-date - Draft, review or update policies, agreements, documents and projects related to collection, use and disclosure of personal information, in accordance with changes in privacy laws and regulations and/or changes in business; manage a periodical assessment of the privacy governance - Provide legal advice on privacy matters to management and various departments - Working closely with the Group Compliance & Risk Manager, ensure compliance with relevant privacy legislation across the organization of the Zegna Segment and communicate privacy guidance to various stakeholders and departments - Support the Group Legal Affairs & IP Director in managing litigation related to his/her scope of responsibility - Seek appropriate guidance and support from external counsel or expert when necessary - Conduct legal research and stay updated on relevant laws and regulations in his/her scope of responsibility - Assess and manage legal risks associated with business operations and transactions in his/her scope of responsibility BACKGROUND AND PRINCIPAL SKILLS REQUIRED - Solid knowledge of contracts in both Italian and English language and of privacy laws and international requirements - Excellent business sense and problem-solving skills - Proficiency in legal research and drafting in Italian and English - Ability to work autonomously and as part of a team - Strong organizational and time management skills - Agility and openness to digital tools - Strong attention to detail - Ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously and capacity to work under pressure and/or with tight deadlines - Proactive approach to identifying and addressing legal issues - Ability to explain complex legal concepts to non-legal stakeholders - Knowledge of the fashion or luxury sector is preferable - Familiarity with cross-border operations for companies with global operations and/or listed companies will be considered a plus - At least 5 years of legal experience, preferably including both in-house experience and experience in a law firm - Master's Degree in Law - Outstanding written and verbal communication abilities both in Italian and English
descriptionByLocale.de:
Beschreibung GRUNDLEGENDER ZWECK DER ARBEIT Als Senior Legal Specialist ist er/sie für die rechtliche Beratung und Unterstützung in geschäftlichen und datenschutzbezogenen Angelegenheiten verantwortlich. HAUPTVERANTWORTLICHKEITEN Unter der Aufsicht des Group Legal Affairs & IP Director für das Zenna-Segment wird er/sie dem Management und anderen Abteilungen in einer Vielzahl von rechtlichen und Datenschutzangelegenheiten, die das Unternehmen betreffen, rechtliche Beratung und Beratung bieten, insbesondere: - Entwurf, Überprüfung und Verhandlung von Verträgen, Vereinbarungen und anderen rechtlichen Dokumenten wie Liefer- und Kaufverträgen, Dienstleistungs- und Beratungsverträge, Mietverträge, Franchise-, Agentur- und Großhandelsverträge – Verwaltung des kommerziellen Vertragslebenszyklus (Verhandlung, Abschluss, Nachverfolgung der Ausführung, Verlängerung, Beendigung) in Übereinstimmung mit geltenden Gesetzen und internen Richtlinien sowie Aktualisierung der Vertragslebenszyklusdatenbank – Entwurf, Überprüfung oder Aktualisierung von Richtlinien, Vereinbarungen, Dokumenten und Projekten im Zusammenhang mit Sammlung, Nutzung und Offenlegung personenbezogener Daten, im Einklang mit Änderungen der Datenschutzgesetze und -vorschriften und/oder Änderungen im Geschäftsbereich; eine regelmäßige Bewertung der Datenschutzgovernance zu verwalten - Rechtsberatung zu Datenschutzangelegenheiten für das Management und verschiedene Abteilungen zu bieten - Eng mit dem Group Compliance & Risk Manager zusammenzuarbeiten, die Einhaltung der relevanten Datenschutzgesetze im gesamten Zenga-Segment sicherzustellen und Datenschutzhinweise an verschiedene Interessengruppen und Abteilungen zu kommunizieren - Den Group Legal Affairs & IP Director bei der Leitung von Rechtsstreitigkeiten im Zusammenhang mit seinem/ihrem Verantwortungsbereich zu unterstützen - Angemessene Suche geeigneter Beratung und Unterstützung durch externe Anwälte oder Experten, wenn nötig - Rechtsforschung durchführen und über relevante Gesetze und Vorschriften im Verantwortungsbereich auf dem Laufenden bleiben - Rechtsrisiken im Zusammenhang mit Geschäftstätigkeiten und Transaktionen im Verantwortungsbereich bewerten und managen – ERFORDERLICHE HINTERGRUND- UND HAUPTKOMPETENZEN - Fundbasierte Kenntnisse von Verträgen in italienischer und englischer Sprache sowie Datenschutzrecht und internationalen
• Anforderungen - Ausgezeichnetes Geschäftssinn und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten – Kompetenz in juristischer Forschung und Entwurf auf Italienisch und Englisch – Fähigkeit, eigenständig und im Team zu arbeiten – Starke organisatorische und zeitmanagementfähige Fähigkeiten – Agilität und Offenheit für digitale Werkzeuge – Große Liebe zum Detail – Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte gleichzeitig zu bewältigen und unter Druck und/oder mit engen Fristen zu arbeiten – Proaktiver Ansatz zur Identifizierung und Bearbeitung rechtlicher Probleme – Fähigkeit, komplexe Rechtskonzepte zu erklären nicht-juristische Interessengruppen – Kenntnisse im Mode- oder Luxussektor sind vorzuziehen – Kenntnisse mit grenzüberschreitenden Abläufen bei Unternehmen mit globaler Tätigkeit und/oder börsennotierten Unternehmen werden als Vorteil betrachtet – Mindestens 5 Jahre juristische Erfahrung, vorzugsweise sowohl interne als auch in einer Kanzlei – Masterabschluss in Rechtswissenschaften – Hervorragende schriftliche und mündliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten sowohl auf Italienisch als auch auf Englisch
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description BUT DE BASE DE L'EMPLOI En tant que spécialiste juridique principal, il sera chargé de fournir des conseils et un soutien juridiques sur des questions commerciales et liées à la vie privée. PRINCIPAUX RESPONSABILITÉS - il/elle fournira des conseils juridiques à la direction et à d'autres ministères sur un large éventail de questions juridiques et de protection de la vie privée qui touchent l'entreprise, en particulier: - rédiger, examiner et négocier des contrats, des accords de travail et d'autres documents juridiques, tels que les contrats de fourniture et d'achat, les services et les contrats de conseil, les contrats de concession, de franchise, d'agence et de gros - gérer le cycle de vie des contrats commerciaux (négociation, conclusion, suivi de l'exécution, renouvellement, résiliation) conformément aux lois et politiques internes applicables, et maintenir à jour la base de données sur le cycle de vie des contrats - rédiger, réviser ou mettre à jour des politiques, des accords, des documents et des projets liés à la collecte, à l'utilisation et à la communication de renseignements personnels, conformément aux modifications des lois et règlements relatifs à la vie privée et/ou aux changements d'affaires; gérer une évaluation périodique de la gouvernance de la vie privée - fournir des conseils juridiques sur les questions de protection de la vie privée à la direction et à divers ministères - travailler en étroite collaboration avec le gestionnaire de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la vie privée Au moins 5 ans d'expérience en droit, incluant de préférence à la fois une expérience en interne et une expérience dans un cabinet d'avocats - Maîtrise en droit - Capacités exceptionnelles en communication écrite et verbale en italien et en anglais

jobs.department: Corporate and Staff Functions/Legal, Compliance & Risk
jobs.category: Corporate and Staff Functions/Legal, Compliance & Risk

jobs.title: SAP Business Continuity Service Manager
jobs.description: ABOUT US Founded in 1910 in Trivero, Italy, the Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) is a global luxury company with a leading position in the high-end menswear business. Through its three complementary brands, the Group reaches a wide range of communities and market segments across the high-end fashion industry, from ZEGNA’s timeless luxury to the modern tailoring of Thom Browne, to seductive elegance with TOM FORD FASHION. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group is internationally recognized for its unique Filiera, owned and controlled by the Group, which is made up of the finest Italian textile producers fully integrated with unique luxury manufacturing capabilities, ensuring superior excellence, quality, and innovation. The Group employs more than 7,100 people worldwide. YOUR OPPORTUNITY The SAP Business Continuity Service Manager plays a pivotal role within the IT Business Continuity team, ensuring the end‑to‑end stability, integration, and continuity of the SAP S/4HANA platform and the broader application landscape supporting the company’s core business processes. The role requires constant engagement with vertical SAP teams responsible for first‑level Application Management Services (AMS), as well as close collaboration with the SAP CoE Manager to guarantee performance, reliability, and scalability across the SAP ecosystem. The position also oversees external AMS third‑party suppliers and service partners, ensuring alignment with internal standards, operating guidelines, and contractual commitments. In addition, the SAP Business Continuity Service Manager leads an internal Governance team that oversees key operational pillars, including the ServiceNow ticketing platform, account management services, testing automation tools, application transport management, and all end‑user communications related to planned and unplanned maintenance activities. As part of the Business Continuity team, the SAP Service Manager will actively contribute to the SAP RISE migration roadmap, coordinate cross‑functional workstreams, supervise Integration and User Acceptance Testing and ensure seamless alignment between internal stakeholders and external implementation partners. The role will be based in Stabio (Switzerland). HOW YOU BRING IT TO LIFE Provide leadership and oversight for SAP S/4HANA service delivery teams across application modules, interfaces, and hybrid/cloud environments. Lead the Governance team (covering ServiceNow, Testing Automation, Account and Release Management). Coordinate with third‑party suppliers and service partners to maintain process consistency, efficiency, and quality ensuring availability and continuity in line with corporate SLAs. Ensure effective execution and continuous enhancement of Business Continuity processes (Support Request, Incident, Problem, and Change Management), compliant with SOX standards. Manage external vendors and service providers contracts, overseeing KPI performance and contractual compliance through structured review sessions. Support strategic project initiatives by delivering Business Continuity Make‑mode services to other IT teams, ensuring alignment with IT Stream Leaders and the Demand function, and guaranteeing the quality and risk governance of all deliverables. WHO YOU ARE Technical & Professional Skills Strong expertise in SAP S/4HANA, with solid understanding of key functional modules and SAP technical architecture Proven experience managing complex SAP environments, ideally in hybrid and/or cloud-based contexts, with a strong orientation toward service quality Exposure to SAP RISE and/or large SAP transformation or migration programs with a strong innovation mindset Solid knowledge of SAP integrations with external systems (APIs, middleware, EDI, cloud services) Deep familiarity with ITIL practices and enterprise service management frameworks and IT process oversight Experience with ServiceNow ticketing platforms is considered a plus Background in Fashion & Luxury industry is a plus Experience 3–5 years of experience in similar roles within structured corporate IT organizations and/or consulting companies Soft Skills Strong leadership and stakeholder management capabilities Structured, governance-oriented mindset with high attention to service quality Ability to operate effectively in complex, cross-functional environments Proactive, reliable, and comfortable managing multiple priorities Education Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Management Engineering, or other STEM disciplines (equivalent SAP-related experience may be considered) Languages Good knowledge of English, written and spoken Mobility Willingness to travel occasionally for business needs

descriptionByLocale.it: Fondata nel 1910 a Trivero, Italia, il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna (NYSE:ZGN) è una società di lusso globale con una posizione di primo piano nel business menswear di fascia alta. Attraverso i suoi tre marchi complementari, il Gruppo raggiunge una vasta gamma di comunità e segmenti di mercato in tutto il settore della moda di fascia alta, dal lusso senza tempo di ZEGNA alla moderna sartoria di Thom Browne, alla seducente eleganza con TOM FORD FASHION. Il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna è riconosciuto a livello internazionale per la sua unica Filiera, di proprietà e controllata dal Gruppo, costituito dai migliori produttori tessili italiani pienamente integrati con capacità produttive di lusso uniche, garantendo un'eccellenza, qualità e innovazione superiore. Il Gruppo impiega oltre 7,100 persone in tutto il mondo. TUA OPPORTUNITÀ Il SAP Business Continuity Service Manager svolge un ruolo cardine all’interno del team IT Business Continuity, garantendo la stabilità, l’integrazione e la continuità della piattaforma SAP S/4HANA e il panorama delle applicazioni più ampio che supporta i processi aziendali fondamentali dell’azienda. Il ruolo richiede un costante impegno con i team SAP verticali responsabili dei servizi di gestione delle applicazioni di primo livello (AMS), nonché una stretta collaborazione con SAP CoE Manager per garantire prestazioni, affidabilità e scalabilità in tutto l'ecosistema SAP. La posizione supervisiona anche fornitori e partner di servizi esterni AMS di terze parti, garantendo l'allineamento con gli standard interni, le linee guida operative e gli impegni contrattuali. Inoltre, il SAP Business Continuity Service Manager guida un team di governance interna che supervisiona i principali pilastri operativi, tra cui la piattaforma di ticketing ServiceNow, i servizi di gestione account, gli strumenti di analisi dell'automazione, la gestione dei trasporti delle applicazioni e tutte le comunicazioni degli utenti finali relative alle attività di manutenzione pianificate e non pianificate. Nell'ambito del team Business Continuity, SAP Service Manager contribuirà attivamente alla roadmap di migrazione SAP RISE, coordina i flussi di lavoro interfunzionali, supervisiona l'integrazione e l'accettazione degli utenti e garantisce un allineamento senza interruzioni tra gli stakeholder interni e i partner di implementazione esterni. Il ruolo si baserà a Stabio (Svizzera). Gestione delle competenze e dei sistemi di gestione delle competenze e delle competenze aziendali Lingue - Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese, scritta e parlata Mobilità - Volontà di viaggiare occasionalmente per esigenze aziendali

descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung ÜBER UNS Gegründet 1910 in Trivero, Italien, ist die Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) ein globales Luxusunternehmen mit einer führenden Position im High-End-Männer-Swear-Geschäft. Durch die drei komplementären Marken erreicht die Gruppe ein breites Spektrum an Kommunen und Marktsegmenten über die High-End-Modebranche, vom zeitlosen Luxus ZEGNA bis hin zur modernen Anpassung von Thom Browne bis hin zur verführerischen Eleganz mit TOM FORD FASHION. Die Ermenegildo Zegna Gruppe ist international anerkannt für ihre einzigartige Filiera, die im Besitz und unter Kontrolle der Gruppe ist, die aus den feinsten italienischen Textilherstellern besteht, die vollständig mit einzigartigen Luxus-Produktionskapazitäten integriert sind, um höchste Exzellenz, Qualität und Innovation zu gewährleisten. Der Konzern beschäftigt weltweit mehr als 7.100 Mitarbeiter. IHRE BERICHT Der SAP Business Continuity Service Manager spielt eine zentrale Rolle innerhalb des IT Business Continuity Teams, um die dauerhafte Stabilität, Integration und Kontinuität der SAP S/4HANA-Plattform und der breiteren Anwendungslandschaft zu gewährleisten, die die Kerngeschäftsprozesse des Unternehmens unterstützt. Die Rolle erfordert ein ständiges Engagement mit vertikalen SAP-Teams, die für First-Level Application Management Services (AMS) verantwortlich sind, sowie eine enge Zusammenarbeit mit dem SAP CoE Manager, um Leistung, Zuverlässigkeit und Skalierbarkeit im gesamten SAP-Ökosystem zu gewährleisten. Die Position überwacht auch externe AMS-Lieferanten und Servicepartner von Drittanbietern und gewährleistet eine Angleichung an interne Standards, Betriebsleitlinien und vertragliche Verpflichtungen. Darüber hinaus führt der SAP Business Continuity Service Manager ein internes Governance-Team, das die wichtigsten operativen Säulen überwacht, einschließlich der ServiceNow Ticketing-Plattform, Account Management-Services, Testautomatisierungstools, Application Transport Management und allen Endnutzer-Kommunikationen im Zusammenhang mit geplanten und nicht geplanten Wartungsarbeiten. Im Rahmen des Business Continuity-Teams wird der SAP Service Manager aktiv zum SAP RISE Migrationsplan beitragen, funktionsübergreifende Arbeitsabläufe koordinieren, Integration und User Acceptance Testing überwachen und eine nahtlose Ausrichtung zwischen internen Stakeholdern und externen Implementierungspartnern gewährleisten. Die Rolle wird in Stabio (Schweiz) getragen. HOW YOU BRING IT TO LIFE - Führende und Aufsicht für SAP S/4HANA-Services über Anwendungsmodule, Schnittstellen und hybride/Cloud-Umgebungen - Führen Sie das Governance-Team (Covering ServiceNow, Testing Automation, Account and Release Management) Sprachen - Gute Englischkenntnisse, schriftliche und gesprochene Mobilität - Bereitschaft, gelegentlich für Geschäftsbedürfnisse zu reisen
descriptionByLocale.fr: Descrizione À PROPOS DE NOUS Fondé en 1910 à Trivero, en Italie, le groupe Ermenegildo Zegna (NYSE:ZGN) est une entreprise de luxe mondiale avec une position de leader dans l'industrie du vêtement masculin haut de gamme. Grâce à ses trois marques complémentaires, le Groupe rejoint un large éventail de communautés et de segments de marché dans l'industrie de la mode haut de gamme, du luxe intemporel de ZEGNA au tissage moderne de Thom Browne, à l'élégance séduisante avec TOM FORD FASHION. Le Groupe Ermenegildo Zegna est reconnu internationalement pour son Filiera unique, détenu et contrôlé par le Groupe, qui est composé des meilleurs producteurs de textiles italiens entièrement intégrés avec des capacités de fabrication de luxe uniques, assurant une excellence, une qualité et une innovation supérieures. Le Groupe emploie plus de 7 100 personnes dans le monde. VOTRE OPPORTUNITÉ Le gestionnaire de services de continuité des activités SAP joue un rôle central au sein de l'équipe de continuité des activités TI, assurant la stabilité, l'intégration et la continuité de la plateforme SAP S/4HANA et du paysage d'applications plus large qui soutient les processus opérationnels essentiels de l'entreprise. Le rôle exige un engagement constant avec les équipes verticales SAP responsables des Services de gestion des applications (AMS) de premier niveau, ainsi qu'une collaboration étroite avec le gestionnaire du CoE SAP pour garantir la performance, la fiabilité et l'évolutivité de l'écosystème SAP. Le poste supervise également les fournisseurs et partenaires de services externes du SGA, en veillant à l'harmonisation avec les normes internes, les lignes directrices opérationnelles et les engagements contractuels. De plus, le gestionnaire de services de continuité des activités SAP dirige une équipe de gouvernance interne qui supervise les principaux piliers opérationnels, y compris la plate-forme de billetterie ServiceNow, les services de gestion de compte, l'essai des outils d'automatisation, la gestion du transport d'applications et toutes les communications des utilisateurs finals liées aux activités de maintenance planifiées et imprévues. Dans le cadre de l'équipe de continuité des activités, le gestionnaire de services SAP contribuera activement à la feuille de route de migration SAP RISE, coordonnera les flux de travail interfonctionnels, supervisera les tests d'intégration et d'acceptation par les utilisateurs et veillera à ce que les parties prenantes internes et les partenaires externes de mise en œuvre soient en harmonie. Le rôle sera basé à Stabio (Suisse). La gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la gestion de la Langues - Bonne connaissance de l'anglais, de l'écrit et de la langue parlée Mobilité - Volonté de voyager à l'occasion pour des besoins professionnels

jobs.title: IT Sales Project Manager
jobs.description: ABOUT US Founded in 1910 in Trivero, Italy, the Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) is a global luxury company with a leading position in the high-end menswear business. Through its three complementary brands, the Group reaches a wide range of communities and market segments across the high-end fashion industry, from ZEGNA’s timeless luxury to the modern tailoring of Thom Browne, to seductive elegance with TOM FORD FASHION. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group is internationally recognized for its unique Filiera, owned and controlled by the Group, which is made up of the finest Italian textile producers fully integrated with unique luxury manufacturing capabilities, to ensure superior excellence, quality and innovation capacity. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group has more than 7,100 employees worldwide. YOUR OPPORTUNITY As an IT Sales Project Manager, you will join the IT Direct to Consumer team and play a key role in the global retail transformation journey, impacting over 300 stores worldwide. You will work on the evolution of the global POS ecosystem based on Oracle Retail Xstore, contributing to the development of scalable, omnichannel retail solutions and enhancing the in-store customer experience across markets. You will act as a bridge between business needs and technical implementation, working closely with internal stakeholders and external partners in a dynamic and international environment. * The role will be based in Stabio (Switzerland) or alternatively in Milano / Lomazzo HOW YOU BRING IT TO LIFE Collect, analyze and prioritize business requirements, translating them into functional specifications and scalable technical solutions Act as a key interface between business, IT teams and external vendors, ensuring alignment and effective delivery Oversee the implementation and evolution of the global POS core model (Oracle Xstore), including country localizations and compliance with VAT and taxation requirements Coordinate and supervise integrations with internal enterprise systems and third-party platforms Support global POS roll-outs and system enhancements across the store network Guide external partners and system integrators through implementation phases, ensuring quality and timelines Deliver user training and provide ongoing support on new tools, features and functionalities You will operate across multiple streams, from transformation projects to ongoing system evolutions and enhancements, contributing to continuous improvement initiatives within the retail ecosystem. WHO YOU ARE Technical & Professional Skills Strong knowledge of Oracle Retail Xstore Suite (Xstore, Xstore Mobile, Xoffice Cloud) Good understanding of system integrations within complex IT ecosystems Knowledge of Oracle DB and SQL is a plus Knowledge of OROB / ORCE, Java, XML is a plus Experience in supervising software development and system customization projects Familiarity with cloud-based solutions and automation / AI technologies is considered a plus Experience in troubleshooting, user support and training delivery Experience 3–5 years of experience on Oracle Retail Xstore Suite / POS solutions Experience in global roll-outs, system implementations and customization projects Background in complex, structured and fast paced environments Soft Skills Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills Ability to work effectively in a global, cross-functional environment Proactive, structured and able to manage multiple priorities Comfortable working under pressure and tight timelines Confident in presenting technical topics to both technical and non-technical audiences Education Master’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or similar Languages Fluent English, written and spoken (daily interaction with international markets required)

descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione INFORMAZIONI SU US Fondato nel 1910 a Trivero, Italia, il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna (NYSE:ZGN) è un'azienda globale di lusso con una posizione di primo piano nel settore dell'abbigliamento maschile di alto livello. Attraverso i suoi tre marchi complementari, il Gruppo raggiunge una vasta gamma di comunità e segmenti di mercato nell'industria della moda di alto livello, dal lusso senza tempo di ZEGNA alla moderna sartoria di Thom Browne, fino all'eleganza seducente con TOM FORD FASHION. Il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna è riconosciuto a livello internazionale per la sua unica Filiera, di proprietà e controllata dal Gruppo, composta dai migliori produttori tessili italiani pienamente integrati con capacità produttive di lusso uniche, per garantire eccellenza, qualità e capacità di innovazione superiori. Il Gruppo Ermenegildo Zegna conta più di 7.100 dipendenti in tutto il mondo. LA TUA OPPORTUNITÀ Come Project Manager IT Sales, entrerai a far parte del team IT Direct to Consumer e giocherai un ruolo chiave nel percorso globale di trasformazione del retail, con un impatto su oltre 300 negozi in tutto il mondo. Lavorerai sull'evoluzione dell'ecosistema globale POS basato su Oracle Retail Xstore, contribuendo allo sviluppo di soluzioni retail omnicanale scalabili e migliorando l'esperienza cliente in negozio su tutti i mercati. Agirai come ponte tra le esigenze aziendali e l'implementazione tecnica, lavorando a stretto contatto con stakeholder interni e partner esterni in un ambiente dinamico e internazionale. * Il ruolo avrà sede a Stabio (Svizzera) oppure in alternativa a Milano / Lomazzo COME DARGLI VITA - Raccogliere, analizzare e prioritizzare i requisiti aziendali, traducendoli in specifiche funzionali e soluzioni tecniche scalabili - Agire come interfaccia chiave tra business, team IT e fornitori esterni, garantendo allineamento e consegna efficace - Supervisionare l'implementazione e l'evoluzione del modello globale di core POS (Oracle Xstore), inclusa la localizzazione per paese e la conformità ai requisiti di IVA e fiscalità - Coordinare e supervisionare le integrazioni con sistemi aziendali interni e piattaforme di terze parti - Supportare il lancio globale di POS e i miglioramenti di sistema in tutta la rete store - Guidare partner esterni e integratori di sistema nelle fasi di implementazione, garantendo qualità e tempistiche - Fornire formazione agli utenti e fornire supporto continuo su nuovi strumenti, funzionalità e funzionalità - Opererai in diverse parti molteplici filoni, dai progetti di trasformazione alle continue evoluzioni e miglioramenti dei sistemi, contribuiscono a iniziative di miglioramento continuo all'interno dell'ecosistema retail. CHI SEI Competenze tecniche e professionali - Solida conoscenza della suite Oracle Retail Xstore (Xstore, Xstore Mobile, Xoffice Cloud) - Buona comprensione delle integrazioni di sistemi all'interno di ecosistemi IT complessi - La conoscenza di Oracle DB e SQL è un vantaggio - Conoscenza di OROB / ORCE, Java, XML è un vantaggio - Esperienza nella supervisione di progetti di sviluppo software e personalizzazione di sistemi - Familiarità con soluzioni cloud e tecnologie di automazione / AI è considerata un vantaggio - Esperienza in risoluzione dei problemi, supporto agli utenti e erogazione di formazione - Esperienza 3–5 anni di esperienza su Oracle Retail Xstore Suite / soluzioni POS - Esperienza in implementazioni globali, implementazioni di sistemi e progetti di personalizzazione - Esperienza in ambienti complessi, strutturati e dinamici Soft Skills - Forte mentalità analitica e di problem solving - Eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e gestione degli stakeholder - Capacità di lavorare efficacemente in un ambiente globale, Ambiente interfunzionale - Proattivo, strutturato e capace di gestire molteplici priorità - A suo agio nel lavorare sotto pressione e con tempistiche serrate - Sicuro nel presentare argomenti tecnici sia a pubblico tecnico che non tecnico Formazione - Master in Tecnologie dell'Informazione, Informatica o simili Lingue - Inglese fluente, scritto e parlato (è richiesta interazione quotidiana con i mercati internazionali)
descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione ABOUT US Founded in 1910 in Trivero, Italy, the Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) is a global luxury company with a leading position in the high-end menswear business. Through its three complementary brands, the Group reaches a wide range of communities and market segments across the high-end fashion industry, from ZEGNA’s timeless luxury to the modern tailoring of Thom Browne, to seductive elegance with TOM FORD FASHION. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group is internationally recognized for its unique Filiera, owned and controlled by the Group, which is made up of the finest Italian textile producers fully integrated with unique luxury manufacturing capabilities, to ensure superior excellence, quality and innovation capacity. The Ermenegildo Zegna Group has more than 7,100 employees worldwide. YOUR OPPORTUNITY As an IT Sales Project Manager, you will join the IT Direct to Consumer team and play a key role in the global retail transformation journey, impacting over 300 stores worldwide. You will work on the evolution of the global POS ecosystem based on Oracle Retail Xstore, contributing to the development of scalable, omnichannel retail solutions and enhancing the in-store customer experience across markets. You will act as a bridge between business needs and technical implementation, working closely with internal stakeholders and external partners in a dynamic and international environment. * The role will be based in Stabio (Switzerland) or alternatively in Milano / Lomazzo HOW YOU BRING IT TO LIFE - Collect, analyze and prioritize business requirements, translating them into functional specifications and scalable technical solutions - Act as a key interface between business, IT teams and external vendors, ensuring alignment and effective delivery - Oversee the implementation and evolution of the global POS core model (Oracle Xstore), including country localizations and compliance with VAT and taxation requirements - Coordinate and supervise integrations with internal enterprise systems and third-party platforms - Support global POS roll-outs and system enhancements across the store network - Guide external partners and system integrators through implementation phases, ensuring quality and timelines - Deliver user training and provide ongoing support on new tools, features and functionalities - You will operate across multiple streams, from transformation projects to ongoing system evolutions and enhancements, contributing to continuous improvement initiatives within the retail ecosystem. WHO YOU ARE Technical & Professional Skills - Strong knowledge of Oracle Retail Xstore Suite (Xstore, Xstore Mobile, Xoffice Cloud) - Good understanding of system integrations within complex IT ecosystems - Knowledge of Oracle DB and SQL is a plus - Knowledge of OROB / ORCE, Java, XML is a plus - Experience in supervising software development and system customization projects - Familiarity with cloud-based solutions and automation / AI technologies is considered a plus - Experience in troubleshooting, user support and training delivery - Experience 3–5 years of experience on Oracle Retail Xstore Suite / POS solutions - Experience in global roll-outs, system implementations and customization projects - Background in complex, structured and fast paced environments Soft Skills - Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset - Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills - Ability to work effectively in a global, cross-functional environment - Proactive, structured and able to manage multiple priorities - Comfortable working under pressure and tight timelines - Confident in presenting technical topics to both technical and non-technical audiences Education - Master’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or similar Languages - Fluent English, written and spoken (daily interaction with international markets required)
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung ABOUT US Gründet 1910 in Trivero, Italien, ist der Ermenegildo Zegna Group (NYSE:ZGN) eine globale Luxusgesellschaft mit einer führenden Position im hochwertigen Herrenmodell. Durch seine drei komplementären Marken erreicht der Ermenegildo Zegna Group eine breite Palette von Communities und Marktsegmenten im Hochendmodell, von ZEGNA’s zeitloser Luxus bis zur modernen Anpassung von Thom Browne bis hin zu seduzender Eleganz bei TOM FORD FASHION. Der Ermenegildo Zegna Group ist international bekannt für seine einzigartige Filiera, die von der Gruppe kontrolliert wird und aus den feinsten italienischen Textilherstellern besteht, die vollständig in einzigartige Luxusmanufacturingfähigkeiten integriert sind, um die höchste Qualität, Innovation und Kapazität zu gewährleisten. Der Ermenegildo Zegna Group hat mehr als 7,100 Mitarbeiter weltweit. Ihre Chance Als IT-Verkaufsprojektmanager werden Sie dem IT Direct to Consumer Team beitragen und eine zentrale Rolle in der globalen Einzelhandelsumwandlungsreise spielen, die über 300 Stores weltweit beeinflusst. Sie werden an der Entwicklung des globalen POS-Ecosystems basierend auf Oracle Retail Xstore arbeiten, das zur Entwicklung skalierbarer, omnichannel-Retail-Lösungen und zur Verbesserung der In-Store-Kundenerfahrung über die Märkte beiträgt. Sie werden als Bridge zwischen Geschäftsanforderungen und technischer Implementierung agieren, indem Sie eng mit internen Stakeholdern und externen Partnern in einer dynamischen und internationalen Umgebung arbeiten. * Die Position wird in Stabio (Schweiz) oder alternativ in Milano / Lomazzo basiert. HOW YOU BRING IT TO LIFE - Sammeln, analysieren und priorisieren Sie Geschäftsanforderungen, indem Sie sie in funktionale Spezifikationen und skalierbare technische Lösungen übersetzen - Stellen Sie sich als Schlüssel-Interface zwischen Geschäfts-, IT-Teams und externen Lieferanten, um Ausrichtung und effektive Lieferung zu gewährleisten - Überwachen Sie die Implementierung und Entwicklung des globalen POS-Kernmodells (Oracle Xstore), einschließlich Landungslocalisierungen und Einhaltung von VAT- und Steuervoraussetzungen - Koordinieren und überwachen Sie Integrationen mit internen Unternehmenssystemen und Drittanbieterplattformen - Unterstützen Sie die globale POS-Roll-out und Systemverbesserungen über das Store-Netzwerk - Führen Sie externe Partner und Systemintegratoren durch die Implementierungsphasen, um Qualität und Fristen zu gewährleisten - Bieten Sie Benutzerausbildung und fortlaufende Unterstützung bei neuen Tools, Funktionen und Funktionalitäten an - Sie werden über mehrere Ströme arbeiten, von Transformationsprojekten bis hin zu laufenden Systemevolutionen und Verbesserungen, indem Sie kontinuierliche Verbesserungsinitiativen innerhalb des Einzelhandelsökosystems beitragen. WHO YOU ARE Technische & Professionelle Fähigkeiten - Starke Kenntnisse der Oracle Retail Xstore Suite (Xstore, Xstore Mobile, Xoffice Cloud) - Gutes Verständnis der Systemintegrationen innerhalb komplexer IT-Ecosysteme - Kenntnisse von Oracle DB und SQL sind ein Plus - Kenntnisse von OROB / ORCE, Java, XML sind ein Plus - Erfahrung in der Überwachung von Softwareentwicklung und Systemanpassungsprojekten - Kenntnisse von cloudbasierten Lösungen und Automatisierung / AI-Technologien sind ein Plus - Erfahrung in der Fehlerbehebung, Benutzerunterstützung und Trainingslieferung - Erfahrung von 3–5 Jahren in der Nutzung von Oracle Retail Xstore Suite / POS-Lösungen - Erfahrung in globalen Roll-outs, Systemimplementierungen und Anpassungsprojekten - Hintergrund in komplexen, strukturierten und schnellen Umgebungen Weiche Fähigkeiten - Starke analytische und Problemlösungsfähigkeit - Ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Managementfähigkeiten - Fähigkeit, effektiv in einer globalen, cross-funktionalen Umgebung zu arbeiten - Proaktiv, strukturiert und in der Lage, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten - Komfortabel in der Arbeit unter Druck und enger Fristen - Vertraut mit der Präsentation technischer Themen sowohl für technische als auch nicht-technische Zielgruppen Bildung - Master-Abschluss in Informatik, Computerwissenschaften oder einem ähnlichen Fach Sprachen - Flüssiges Englisch, geschrieben und gesprochen (tägliche Interaktion mit internationalen Märkten erforderlich)
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description ABOUT US Fondée en 1910 à Trivero, en Italie, le groupe Ermenegildo Zegna (NYSE:ZGN) est une entreprise de luxe mondiale avec une position de leader dans le secteur de la mode masculine de luxe. Grâce à ses trois marques complémentaires, le groupe Ermenegildo Zegna atteint une large gamme de communautés et de segments de marché dans l'industrie de la mode de luxe, allant de la timeless luxury de ZEGNA à la modern tailoring de Thom Browne, jusqu'à l'élégance seductive de TOM FORD FASHION. Le groupe Ermenegildo Zegna est internationalement reconnu pour sa unique Filiera, contrôlée par le groupe, qui est composée des meilleurs producteurs de textiles italiens intégrés avec des capacités de fabrication de luxe uniques, pour garantir l'excellence, la qualité et la capacité d'innovation. Le groupe Ermenegildo Zegna emploie plus de 7,100 personnes à travers le monde. Votre opportunité En tant que Manager de Projets IT Vente, vous rejoindrez l'équipe IT Direct to Consumer et jouerez un rôle clé dans le parcours de transformation du commerce de détail mondial, touchant plus de 300 magasins à travers le monde. Vous travaillerez sur l'évolution de l'écosystème POS mondial basé sur Oracle Retail Xstore, contribuant au développement de solutions de retail omnichannel évolutives et améliorant l'expérience client en magasin sur les marchés. Vous agirez comme un pont entre les besoins commerciaux et la mise en œuvre technique, travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les parties prenantes internes et les partenaires externes dans un environnement dynamique et international. * La position sera basée à Stabio (Suisse) ou alternativement à Milano / Lomazzo HOW YOU BRING IT TO LIFE - Recueillir, analyser et prioriser les exigences commerciales, les traduisant en spécifications fonctionnelles et solutions techniques évolutives - Agir comme un point de contact clé entre les équipes commerciales, IT et les fournisseurs externes, assurant l'alignement et la livraison efficace - Surveiller la mise en œuvre et l'évolution du modèle de cœur POS mondial (Oracle Xstore), y compris les localisations nationales et la conformité aux exigences de TVA et de taxation - Coordonner et superviser les intégrations avec les systèmes d'entreprise internes et les plateformes tierces - Soutenir les déploiements globaux POS et les améliorations de système sur le réseau de magasins - Guider les partenaires externes et les intégrateurs de systèmes à travers les phases d'implémentation, assurant la qualité et les délais - Fournir une formation aux utilisateurs et fournir un soutien continu sur les nouveaux outils, fonctionnalités et fonctionnalités - Vous travaillerez sur plusieurs flux, des projets de transformation aux évolutions et améliorations de système en cours, contribuant aux initiatives de amélioration continue au sein de l'écosystème de la vente au détail. WHO YOU ARE Compétences Techniques & Professionnelles - Connaissances approfondies de la suite Oracle Retail Xstore (Xstore, Xstore Mobile, Xoffice Cloud) - Bonnes connaissances des intégrations de systèmes dans des écosystèmes IT complexes - Connaissances de Oracle DB et SQL sont un plus - Connaissances de OROB / ORCE, Java, XML sont un plus - Expérience dans la supervision du développement logiciel et des projets de personnalisation de système - Connaissances des solutions cloud et des technologies d'automatisation / AI sont un plus - Expérience en dépannage, support utilisateur et livraison de formation - Expérience de 3 à 5 ans avec la suite Oracle Retail Xstore / solutions POS - Expérience dans les déploiements mondiaux, les mises en œuvre de systèmes et les projets de personnalisation - Expérience dans des environnements complexes, structurés et à haut rythme Compétences Douces - Esprit analytique et de résolution de problèmes - Excellentes compétences en communication et en gestion des parties prenantes - Capacité à travailler efficacement dans un environnement global et transversal - Proactif, structuré et capable de gérer plusieurs priorités - À l'aise à travailler sous pression et dans des délais serrés - Confiant dans la présentation de sujets techniques à des auditeurs techniques et non techniques Éducation - Diplôme de master en Technologies de l'Information, Sciences Informatique ou similaire Langues - Anglais fluide, écrit et parlé (interaction quotidienne avec les marchés internationaux requise)
